@/lib/preprocessing/distance-matrix */ \"(rsc)/./lib/preprocessing/distance-matrix.ts\");\n/* harmony import */ var _lib_preprocessing_modifiers__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__ = __webpack_require__(/*! @/lib/preprocessing/modifiers */ \"(rsc)/./lib/preprocessing/modifiers.ts\");\n/* harmony import */ var _lib_solvers_held_karp__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__ = __webpack_require__(/*! @/lib/solvers/held-karp */ \"(rsc)/./lib/solvers/held-karp.ts\");\n/* harmony import */ var _lib_solvers_nearest_neighbor__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_5__ = __webpack_require__(/*! @/lib/solvers/nearest-neighbor */ \"(rsc)/./lib/solvers/nearest-neighbor.ts\");\n/* harmony import */ var _lib_solvers_compare__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_6__ = __webpack_require__(/*! @/lib/solvers/compare */ \"(rsc)/./lib/solvers/compare.ts\");\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\nconst runtime = 'nodejs';\nconst maxDuration = 600;\nasync function POST(request) {\n    try {\n        const bodyJson = await request.json();\n        const { locations, algorithm = 'held-karp', solverEngine = 'ts', params = {} } = bodyJson;\n        if (!locations || locations.length < 2) {\n            return next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.NextResponse.json({\n                error: 'At least 2 locations are required'\n            }, {\n                status: 400\n            });\n        }\n        // TS cap only\n        if (algorithm === 'held-karp' && solverEngine !== 'cpp' && locations.length > 18) {\n            return next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.NextResponse.json({\n                error: `Held-Karp (TS) is infeasible for ${locations.length} locations (max 18). Switch to the C++ engine.`\n            }, {\n                status: 400\n            });\n        }\n        const startMatrix = performance.now();\n        const { distances, durations } = await (0,_lib_preprocessing_distance_matrix__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__.buildDistanceMatrix)(locations);\n        const matrixTimeMs = Math.round((performance.now() - startMatrix) * 100) / 100;\n        // Log restrictions for debugging\n        const rb = params.roadBlocks;\n        const cz = params.congestionZones;\n        if (rb && rb.length > 0 || cz && cz.length > 0) {\n            console.log(`[Solve] Restrictions received: ${rb?.length || 0} road blocks, ${cz?.length || 0} congestion zones`);\n        }\n        const { weightedDistances } = (0,_lib_preprocessing_modifiers__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__.applyModifiers)(distances, durations, params, locations);\n        const startSolve = performance.now();\n        let result;\n        switch(algorithm){\n            case 'held-karp':\n                {\n                    if (solverEngine === 'cpp') {\n                        try {\n                            const n = weightedDistances.length;\n                            const input = n + '\\n' + weightedDistances.map((row)=>row.join(' ')).join('\\n') + '\\n';\n                            const solution = await new Promise((resolve, reject)=>{\n                                const bin = process.platform === 'win32' ? './held-karp-cpp/heldkarp.exe' : './held-karp-cpp/heldkarp';\n                                const proc = (0,child_process__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.spawn)(bin);\n                                let output = '';\n                                let errorOutput = '';\n                                proc.stdout.on('data', (data)=>{\n                                    output += data.toString();\n                                });\n                                proc.stderr.on('data', (data)=>{\n                                    errorOutput += data.toString();\n                                });\n                                proc.on('close', (code)=>{\n                                    if (code !== 0) {\n                                        return reject(new Error(errorOutput || `Held-Karp (C++) exited with code ${code}`));\n                                    }\n                                    try {\n                                        const lines = output.trim().split('\\n');\n                                        const distance = parseFloat(lines[0]);\n                                        const tour = lines[1].trim().split(' ').map(Number);\n                                        resolve({\n                                            tour,\n                                            distance,\n                                            solverName: 'Held-Karp (C++)'\n                                        });\n                                    } catch  {\n                                        reject(new Error('Failed to parse C++ solver output'));\n                                    }\n                                });\n                                proc.stdin.write(input);\n                                proc.stdin.end();\n                            });\n                            result = {\n                                solution\n                            };\n                        } catch (err) {\n                            console.warn('C++ solver failed — falling back to TS', err);\n                            result = {\n                                solution: {\n                                    ...(0,_lib_solvers_held_karp__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.heldKarp)(weightedDistances, 0),\n                                    solverName: 'Held-Karp (TS fallback)'\n                                }\n                            };\n                        }\n                    } else {\n                        result = {\n                            solution: (0,_lib_solvers_held_karp__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.heldKarp)(weightedDistances, 0)\n                        };\n                    }\n                    break;\n                }\n            case 'nearest-neighbor':\n                result = {\n                    solution: (0,_lib_solvers_nearest_neighbor__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_5__.nearestNeighbor)(weightedDistances, 0)\n                };\n                break;\n            case 'compare':\n                result = (0,_lib_solvers_compare__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_6__.compareSolvers)(weightedDistances, 0);\n                break;\n            case 'qaoa':\n                {\n                    const quantumResponse = await fetch('http://127.0.0.1:5001/solve', {\n                        method: 'POST',\n                        headers: {\n                            'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n                        },\n                        body: JSON.stringify({\n                            distanceMatrix: weightedDistances,\n                            startNode: 0\n                        }),\n                        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(600000)\n                    });\n                    if (!quantumResponse.ok) {\n                        const err = await quantumResponse.json();\n                        return next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.NextResponse.json({\n                            error: err.error || 'Quantum solver failed'\n                        }, {\n                            status: quantumResponse.status\n                        });\n                    }\n                    const quantumData = await quantumResponse.json();\n                    result = {\n                        solution: {\n                            tour: quantumData.tour,\n                            distance: quantumData.distance,\n                            solverName: quantumData.solverName,\n                            isFeasible: quantumData.isFeasible,\n                            quantumMetrics: quantumData.quantumMetrics,\n                            backend: quantumData.quantumMetrics?.backend ?? 'unknown',\n                            executionMode: quantumData.quantumMetrics?.executionMode ?? 'local_simulator',\n                            fallbackReason: quantumData.quantumMetrics?.fallbackReason ?? null\n                        }\n                    };\n                    break;\n                }\n            default:\n                return next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.NextResponse.json({\n                    error: `Unknown algorithm: ${algorithm}`\n                }, {\n                    status: 400\n                });\n        }\n        const solveTimeMs = Math.round((performance.now() - startSolve) * 100) / 100;\n        const response = {\n            algorithm,\n            ...result,\n            metadata: {\n                locationCount: locations.length,\n                matrixTimeMs,\n                solveTimeMs,\n                totalTimeMs: matrixTimeMs + solveTimeMs\n            },\n            distanceMatrix: weightedDistances,\n            rawDistanceMatrix: distances\n        };\n        const solution = result.solution;\n        const hkResult = result.heldKarp;\n        const nnResult = result.nearestNeighbor;\n        if (solution) {\n            response.routeCoords = solution.tour.map((i)=>locations[i]);\n        }\n        if (hkResult && hkResult.tour) {\n            response.heldKarpRouteCoords = hkResult.tour.map((i)=>locations[i]);\n        }\n        if (nnResult && nnResult.tour) {\n            response.nnRouteCoords = nnResult.tour.map((i)=>locations[i]);\n        }\n        return next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.NextResponse.json(response);\n    } catch (err) {\n        console.error('Solve error:', err);\n        const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Internal server error';\n        return next_server__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.NextResponse.json({\n            error: message\n        }, {\n            status: 500\n        });\n    }\n}\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(rsc)/./app/api/solve/route.ts\n");

/***/ }),

/***/ "(rsc)/./lib/preprocessing/distance-matrix.ts":
/*!**********************************************!*\
  !*** ./lib/preprocessing/distance-matrix.ts ***!
  \**********************************************/
/***/ ((__unused_webpack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) => {

"use strict";
eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   buildDistanceMatrix: () => (/* binding */ buildDistanceMatrix)\n/* harmony export */ });\n/**\n * Fetches the pairwise distance/duration matrix from OSRM Table API.\n * OSRM uses Dijkstra / Contraction Hierarchies on the road network graph,\n * giving true shortest-path road distances between all location pairs.\n */ async function buildDistanceMatrix(locations) {\n    if (locations.length < 2) {\n        throw new Error('At least 2 locations are required');\n    }\n    // Build OSRM coordinates string: lng,lat;lng,lat;...\n    const coords = locations.map((l)=>`${l.lng},${l.lat}`).join(';');\n    const url = `https://router.project-osrm.org/table/v1/driving/${coords}?annotations=distance,duration`;\n    try {\n        const response = await fetch(url);\n        const data = await response.json();\n        if (data.code !== 'Ok') {\n            throw new Error(`OSRM API error: ${data.code} — ${data.message || 'unknown error'}`);\n        }\n        return {\n            distances: data.distances,\n            durations: data.durations\n        };\n    } catch (err) {\n        // Fallback: compute Haversine distances if OSRM fails\n        const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'unknown error';\n        console.warn('OSRM API failed, falling back to Haversine distances:', message);\n        return buildHaversineMatrix(locations);\n    }\n}\n/**\n * Fallback: Haversine distance matrix (straight-line, not road-based).\n */ function buildHaversineMatrix(locations) {\n    const n = locations.length;\n    const distances = Array.from({\n        length: n\n    }, ()=>new Array(n).fill(0));\n    const durations = Array.from({\n        length: n\n    }, ()=>new Array(n).fill(0));\n    for(let i = 0; i < n; i++){\n        for(let j = 0; j < n; j++){\n            if (i !== j) {\n                const d = haversine(locations[i], locations[j]);\n                distances[i][j] = d;\n                // Estimate duration at ~40 km/h average speed\n                durations[i][j] = d / 1000 / 40 * 3600;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    return {\n        distances,\n        durations\n    };\n}\n/**\n * Haversine formula — great-circle distance in meters.\n */ function haversine(a, b) {\n    const R = 6371000; // Earth radius in meters\n    const toRad = (deg)=>deg * Math.PI / 180;\n    const dLat = toRad(b.lat - a.lat);\n    const dLng = toRad(b.lng - a.lng);\n    const sinLat = Math.sin(dLat / 2);\n    const sinLng = Math.sin(dLng / 2);\n    const h = sinLat * sinLat + Math.cos(toRad(a.lat)) * Math.cos(toRad(b.lat)) * sinLng * sinLng;\n    return 2 * R * Math.asin(Math.sqrt(h));\n}\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(rsc)/./lib/preprocessing/distance-matrix.ts\n");

/***/ }),

/***/ "(rsc)/./lib/preprocessing/modifiers.ts":
/*!****************************************!*\
  !*** ./lib/preprocessing/modifiers.ts ***!
  \****************************************/
/***/ ((__unused_webpack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) => {

"use strict";
eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   applyModifiers: () => (/* binding */ applyModifiers)\n/* harmony export */ });\n/**\n * Applies logistics parameter modifiers to the raw distance matrix.\n * Each modifier is a multiplicative factor on edge weights, directly\n * influencing the structure of the distance matrix before TSP solving.\n */ /**\n * Haversine distance in km between two lat/lng points.\n */ function haversineKm(a, b) {\n    const R = 6371;\n    const toRad = (deg)=>deg * Math.PI / 180;\n    const dLat = toRad(b.lat - a.lat);\n    const dLng = toRad(b.lng - a.lng);\n    const sinLat = Math.sin(dLat / 2);\n    const sinLng = Math.sin(dLng / 2);\n    const h = sinLat * sinLat + Math.cos(toRad(a.lat)) * Math.cos(toRad(b.lat)) * sinLng * sinLng;\n    return 2 * R * Math.asin(Math.sqrt(h));\n}\n/**\n * Approximate minimum distance (km) from point P to the line segment A→B.\n * Uses a flat-earth approximation (lat/lng treated as Cartesian) which\n * is accurate enough for route-level distances.\n */ function pointToSegmentDistKm(p, a, b) {\n    // Convert to approximate km-based coordinates\n    const cosLat = Math.cos((a.lat + b.lat) / 2 * (Math.PI / 180));\n    const ax = a.lng * cosLat;\n    const ay = a.lat;\n    const bx = b.lng * cosLat;\n    const by = b.lat;\n    const px = p.lng * cosLat;\n    const py = p.lat;\n    const dx = bx - ax;\n    const dy = by - ay;\n    const lenSq = dx * dx + dy * dy;\n    let t = 0;\n    if (lenSq > 0) {\n        t = ((px - ax) * dx + (py - ay) * dy) / lenSq;\n        t = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, t));\n    }\n    const closestX = ax + t * dx;\n    const closestY = ay + t * dy;\n    // Convert back to km (1 degree latitude ≈ 111.32 km)\n    const distDeg = Math.sqrt((px - closestX) * (px - closestX) + (py - closestY) * (py - closestY));\n    return distDeg * 111.32;\n}\n/**\n * Check if a line segment A→B passes through a circle centered at C with radius r (km).\n */ function segmentIntersectsCircle(a, b, center, radiusKm) {\n    return pointToSegmentDistKm(center, a, b) <= radiusKm;\n}\n// A very large distance value that won't overflow when summed in C++ solver\n// (1 billion meters = 1 million km — larger than any real route)\nconst BLOCKED_DISTANCE = 1e9;\nfunction applyModifiers(distances, durations, params = {}, locations) {\n    const n = distances.length;\n    const { trafficCongestion = 1.0, rushHourMultiplier = 1.0, roadTypePreference = 1.0, fuelEfficiency = 1.0, deliveryPriority = null, roadBlocks = [], congestionZones = [] } = params;\n    const weightedDistances = Array.from({\n        length: n\n    }, ()=>new Array(n).fill(0));\n    const weightedDurations = Array.from({\n        length: n\n    }, ()=>new Array(n).fill(0));\n    // Combined edge-level modifier (applies uniformly to all edges)\n    const edgeMultiplier = trafficCongestion * rushHourMultiplier * roadTypePreference * fuelEfficiency;\n    for(let i = 0; i < n; i++){\n        for(let j = 0; j < n; j++){\n            if (i === j) continue;\n            let distMod = edgeMultiplier;\n            let durMod = trafficCongestion * rushHourMultiplier;\n            // Delivery priority: edges leading TO high-priority nodes get reduced weight\n            if (deliveryPriority && deliveryPriority[j] !== undefined) {\n                distMod *= deliveryPriority[j];\n                durMod *= deliveryPriority[j];\n            }\n            weightedDistances[i][j] = distances[i][j] * distMod;\n            weightedDurations[i][j] = durations[i][j] * durMod;\n        }\n    }\n    // Apply road blocks: block ALL edges whose path passes near the block\n    // A road block has an effective radius of 2km — any edge passing within 2km is blocked\n    if (locations && roadBlocks.length > 0) {\n        const BLOCK_RADIUS_KM = 2.0;\n        for(let i = 0; i < n; i++){\n            for(let j = 0; j < n; j++){\n                if (i === j) continue;\n                if (weightedDistances[i][j] >= BLOCKED_DISTANCE) continue;\n                for (const block of roadBlocks){\n                    if (segmentIntersectsCircle(locations[i], locations[j], block, BLOCK_RADIUS_KM)) {\n                        weightedDistances[i][j] = BLOCKED_DISTANCE;\n                        weightedDurations[i][j] = BLOCKED_DISTANCE;\n                        break; // one block is enough to block this edge\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        console.log(`[Modifiers] Applied ${roadBlocks.length} road block(s) — ` + `blocked edges: ${countBlocked(weightedDistances, n)}`);\n    }\n    // Apply congestion zones: multiply edge weights if the path passes through a zone\n    if (locations && congestionZones.length > 0) {\n        let affectedEdges = 0;\n        for(let i = 0; i < n; i++){\n            for(let j = 0; j < n; j++){\n                if (i === j) continue;\n                if (weightedDistances[i][j] >= BLOCKED_DISTANCE) continue;\n                for (const zone of congestionZones){\n                    if (segmentIntersectsCircle(locations[i], locations[j], zone, zone.radiusKm)) {\n                        weightedDistances[i][j] *= zone.intensity;\n                        weightedDurations[i][j] *= zone.intensity;\n                        affectedEdges++;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        console.log(`[Modifiers] Applied ${congestionZones.length} congestion zone(s) — ` + `affected edges: ${affectedEdges}`);\n    }\n    return {\n        weightedDistances,\n        weightedDurations\n    };\n}\nfunction countBlocked(matrix, n) {\n    let count = 0;\n    for(let i = 0; i < n; i++){\n        for(let j = 0; j < n; j++){\n            if (i !== j && matrix[i][j] >= BLOCKED_DISTANCE) count++;\n        }\n    }\n    return count;\n}\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(rsc)/./lib/preprocessing/modifiers.ts\n");

/***/ }),

/***/ "(rsc)/./lib/solvers/compare.ts":
/*!********************************!*\
  !*** ./lib/solvers/compare.ts ***!
  \********************************/
/***/ ((__unused_webpack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) => {

"use strict";
eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   compareSolvers: () => (/* binding */ compareSolvers)\n/* harmony export */ });\n/* harmony import */ var _held_karp__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__ = __webpack_require__(/*! ./held-karp */ \"(rsc)/./lib/solvers/held-karp.ts\");\n/* harmony import */ var _nearest_neighbor__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__ = __webpack_require__(/*! ./nearest-neighbor */ \"(rsc)/./lib/solvers/nearest-neighbor.ts\");\n/**\n * Compare Mode — Runs both Held-Karp and Nearest Neighbor simultaneously,\n * then quantifies the suboptimality gap.\n */ \n\nfunction compareSolvers(dist, startNode = 0) {\n    const n = dist.length;\n    // Run Nearest Neighbor (always runs)\n    const nnStart = performance.now();\n    const nnResult = (0,_nearest_neighbor__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.nearestNeighbor)(dist, startNode);\n    const nnTime = performance.now() - nnStart;\n    nnResult.timeMs = Math.round(nnTime * 100) / 100;\n    // Run Held-Karp (only if feasible)\n    let hkResult;\n    let suboptimalityGap = null;\n    let gapPercent = 'N/A';\n    if (n <= 18) {\n        const hkStart = performance.now();\n        hkResult = (0,_held_karp__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.heldKarp)(dist, startNode);\n        const hkTime = performance.now() - hkStart;\n        hkResult.timeMs = Math.round(hkTime * 100) / 100;\n        // Gap = (NN - HK) / HK * 100\n        if (hkResult.distance > 0) {\n            suboptimalityGap = nnResult.distance - hkResult.distance;\n            gapPercent = (suboptimalityGap / hkResult.distance * 100).toFixed(2) + '%';\n        }\n    } else {\n        hkResult = {\n            tour: [],\n            distance: 0,\n            solverName: 'Held-Karp (Exact)',\n            timeMs: 0,\n            skipped: true,\n            reason: `Skipped: n=${n} exceeds max 18 for exact solver`\n        };\n    }\n    return {\n        heldKarp: hkResult,\n        nearestNeighbor: nnResult,\n        suboptimalityGap,\n        gapPercent\n    };\n}\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(rsc)/./lib/solvers/compare.ts\n");

/***/ }),

/***/ "(rsc)/./lib/solvers/held-karp.ts":
/*!**********************************!*\
  !*** ./lib/solvers/held-karp.ts ***!
  \**********************************/
/***/ ((__unused_webpack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) => {

"use strict";
eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   heldKarp: () => (/* binding */ heldKarp)\n/* harmony export */ });\n/**\n * Held-Karp Algorithm — Exact TSP solver using bitmask dynamic programming.\n *\n * Binary Encoding (Quantum Mapping):\n *   Each subset S of cities is encoded as a bitmask integer where bit i = 1\n *   means city i is included in the subset.\n *\n * DP Recurrence:\n *   dp[S][i] = min cost to visit all cities in subset S, ending at city i\n *   dp[S][i] = min over j in S\\{i} of { dp[S\\{i}][j] + dist[j][i] }\n *\n * Complexity: O(n² · 2ⁿ)  — feasible for n ≤ 18\n */ function heldKarp(dist, startNode = 0) {\n    const n = dist.length;\n    if (n > 20) {\n        throw new Error(`Held-Karp is infeasible for n=${n} (max 18–20). Use Nearest Neighbor instead.`);\n    }\n    if (n === 1) {\n        return {\n            tour: [\n                startNode\n            ],\n            distance: 0,\n            solverName: 'Held-Karp (Exact)'\n        };\n    }\n    if (n === 2) {\n        const other = startNode === 0 ? 1 : 0;\n        return {\n            tour: [\n                startNode,\n                other,\n                startNode\n            ],\n            distance: dist[startNode][other] + dist[other][startNode],\n            solverName: 'Held-Karp (Exact)'\n        };\n    }\n    const FULL_MASK = (1 << n) - 1;\n    const INF = Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER;\n    const dp = Array.from({\n        length: 1 << n\n    }, ()=>new Float64Array(n).fill(INF));\n    const parent = Array.from({\n        length: 1 << n\n    }, ()=>new Int8Array(n).fill(-1));\n    // Base case: start at startNode\n    dp[1 << startNode][startNode] = 0;\n    // Fill DP table\n    for(let mask = 1; mask <= FULL_MASK; mask++){\n        if (!(mask & 1 << startNode)) continue;\n        for(let u = 0; u < n; u++){\n            if (!(mask & 1 << u)) continue;\n            if (dp[mask][u] === INF) continue;\n            for(let v = 0; v < n; v++){\n                if (mask & 1 << v) continue;\n                const newMask = mask | 1 << v;\n                const newCost = dp[mask][u] + dist[u][v];\n                if (newCost < dp[newMask][v]) {\n                    dp[newMask][v] = newCost;\n                    parent[newMask][v] = u;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    // Find optimal last city before returning to start\n    let minCost = INF;\n    let lastCity = -1;\n    for(let u = 0; u < n; u++){\n        if (u === startNode) continue;\n        const totalCost = dp[FULL_MASK][u] + dist[u][startNode];\n        if (totalCost < minCost) {\n            minCost = totalCost;\n            lastCity = u;\n        }\n    }\n    // Reconstruct tour\n    const tour = [\n        startNode\n    ];\n    let mask = FULL_MASK;\n    let current = lastCity;\n    const path = [];\n    while(current !== startNode){\n        path.push(current);\n        const prev = parent[mask][current];\n        mask ^= 1 << current;\n        current = prev;\n    }\n    path.reverse();\n    tour.push(...path);\n    tour.push(startNode); // Return to depot\n    return {\n        tour,\n        distance: minCost,\n        solverName: 'Held-Karp (Exact)'\n    };\n}\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(rsc)/./lib/solvers/held-karp.ts\n");

/***/ }),

/***/ "(rsc)/./lib/solvers/nearest-neighbor.ts":
/*!*****************************************!*\
  !*** ./lib/solvers/nearest-neighbor.ts ***!
  \*****************************************/
/***/ ((__unused_webpack_module, __webpack_exports__, __webpack_require__) => {

"use strict";
eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   nearestNeighbor: () => (/* binding */ nearestNeighbor)\n/* harmony export */ });\n/**\n * Nearest Neighbor Algorithm — Greedy TSP approximation.\n *\n * Strategy: From the depot, always visit the nearest unvisited city.\n * Fast O(n²) complexity, works for any N, but does NOT guarantee optimality.\n */ function nearestNeighbor(dist, startNode = 0) {\n    const n = dist.length;\n    if (n === 1) {\n        return {\n            tour: [\n                startNode\n            ],\n            distance: 0,\n            solverName: 'Nearest Neighbor (Greedy)'\n        };\n    }\n    const visited = new Set([\n        startNode\n    ]);\n    const tour = [\n        startNode\n    ];\n    let totalDistance = 0;\n    let current = startNode;\n    while(visited.size < n){\n        let nearest = -1;\n        let nearestDist = Infinity;\n        for(let j = 0; j < n; j++){\n            if (!visited.has(j) && dist[current][j] < nearestDist) {\n                nearestDist = dist[current][j];\n                nearest = j;\n            }\n        }\n        visited.add(nearest);\n        tour.push(nearest);\n        totalDistance += nearestDist;\n        current = nearest;\n    }\n    // Return to depot\n    totalDistance += dist[current][startNode];\n    tour.push(startNode);\n    return {\n        tour,\n        distance: totalDistance,\n        solverName: 'Nearest Neighbor (Greedy)'\n    };\n}\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(rsc)/./lib/solvers/nearest-neighbor.ts\n");

/***/ }),

/***/ "(rsc)/./node_modules/next/dist/build/webpack/loaders/next-app-loader/index.js?name=app%2Fapi%2Fsolve%2Froute&page=%2Fapi%2Fsolve%2Froute&appPaths=&pagePath=private-next-app-dir%2Fapi%2Fsolve%2Froute.ts&appDir=%2Fhome%2Fjayadev-narayanan%2FDesktop%2Ffukoff%2Fmakeaton%2Fapp&pageExtensions=tsx&pageExtensions=ts&pageExtensions=jsx&pageExtensions=js&rootDir=%2Fhome%2Fjayadev-narayanan%2FDesktop%2Ffukoff%2Fmakeaton&isDev=true&tsconfigPath=tsconfig.json&basePath=&assetPrefix=&nextConfigOutput=&preferredRegion=&middlewareConfig=e30%3D&isGlobalNotFoundEnabled=!":

eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   handler: () => (/* binding */ handler),\n/* harmony export */   patchFetch: () => (/* binding */ patchFetch),\n/* harmony export */   routeModule: () => (/* binding */ routeModule),\n/* harmony export */   serverHooks: () => (/* binding */ serverHooks),\n/* harmony export */   workAsyncStorage: () => (/* binding */ workAsyncStorage),\n/* harmony export */   workUnitAsyncStorage: () => (/* binding */ workUnitAsyncStorage)\n/* harmony export */ });\n/* harmony import */ var next_dist_server_route_modules_app_route_module_compiled__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__ = __webpack_require__(/*! This should\n// be eliminated when we've moved the other routes to the new format. These\n// are used to hook into the route.\nconst { workAsyncStorage, workUnitAsyncStorage, serverHooks } = routeModule;\nfunction patchFetch() {\n    return (0,next_dist_server_lib_patch_fetch__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__.patchFetch)({\n        workAsyncStorage,\n        workUnitAsyncStorage\n    });\n}\n\nasync function handler(req, res, ctx) {\n    var _nextConfig_experimental;\n    let srcPage = \"/api/solve/route\";\n    // turbopack doesn't normalize `/index` in the page name\n    // so we need to to process dynamic routes properly\n    // TODO: fix turbopack providing differing value from webpack\n    if (false) {} else if (srcPage === '/index') {\n        // we always normalize /index specifically\n        srcPage = '/';\n    }\n    const multiZoneDraftMode = false;\n    const prepareResult = await routeModule.prepare(req, res, {\n        srcPage,\n        multiZoneDraftMode\n    });\n    if (!prepareResult) {\n        res.statusCode = 400;\n        res.end('Bad Request');\n        ctx.waitUntil == null ? void 0 : ctx.waitUntil.call(ctx, Promise.resolve());\n        return null;\n    }\n    const { buildId, params, nextConfig, isDraftMode, prerenderManifest, routerServerContext, isOnDemandRevalidate, revalidateOnlyGenerated, resolvedPathname } = prepareResult;\n    const normalizedSrcPage = (0,next_dist_shared_lib_router_utils_app_paths__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_5__.normalizeAppPath)(srcPage);\n    let isIsr = Boolean(prerenderManifest.dynamicRoutes[normalizedSrcPage] || prerenderManifest.routes[resolvedPathname]);\n    if (isIsr && !isDraftMode) {\n        const isPrerendered = Boolean(prerenderManifest.routes[resolvedPathname]);\n        const prerenderInfo = prerenderManifest.dynamicRoutes[normalizedSrcPage];\n        if (prerenderInfo) {\n            if (prerenderInfo.fallback === false && !isPrerendered) {\n                throw new next_dist_shared_lib_no_fallback_error_external__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_14__.NoFallbackError();\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    let cacheKey = null;\n    if (isIsr && !routeModule.isDev && !isDraftMode) {\n        cacheKey = resolvedPathname;\n        // ensure /index and / is normalized to one key\n        cacheKey = cacheKey === '/index' ? '/' : cacheKey;\n    }\n    const supportsDynamicResponse = // If we're in development, we always support dynamic HTML\n    routeModule.isDev === true || // If this is not SSG or does not have static paths, then it supports\n    // dynamic HTML.\n    !isIsr;\n    // This is a revalidation request if the request is for a static\n    // page and it is not being resumed from a postponed render and\n    // it is not a dynamic RSC request then it is a revalidation\n    // request.\n    const isRevalidate = isIsr && !supportsDynamicResponse;\n    const method = req.method || 'GET';\n    const tracer = (0,next_dist_server_lib_trace_tracer__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.getTracer)();\n    const activeSpan = tracer.getActiveScopeSpan();\n    const context = {\n        params,\n        prerenderManifest,\n        renderOpts: {\n            experimental: {\n                cacheComponents: Boolean(nextConfig.experimental.cacheComponents),\n                authInterrupts: Boolean(nextConfig.experimental.authInterrupts)\n            },\n            supportsDynamicResponse,\n            incrementalCache: (0,next_dist_server_request_meta__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__.getRequestMeta)(req, 'incrementalCache'),\n            cacheLifeProfiles: (_nextConfig_experimental = nextConfig.experimental) == null ? void 0 : _nextConfig_experimental.cacheLife,\n            isRevalidate,\n            waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil,\n            onClose: (cb)=>{\n                res.on('close', cb);\n            },\n            onAfterTaskError: undefined,\n            onInstrumentationRequestError: (error, _request, errorContext)=>routeModule.onRequestError(req, error, errorContext, routerServerContext)\n        },\n        sharedContext: {\n            buildId\n        }\n    };\n    const nodeNextReq = new next_dist_server_base_http_node__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_6__.NodeNextRequest(req);\n    const nodeNextRes = new next_dist_server_base_http_node__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_6__.NodeNextResponse(res);\n    const nextReq = next_dist_server_web_spec_extension_adapters_next_request__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_7__.NextRequestAdapter.fromNodeNextRequest(nodeNextReq, (0,next_dist_server_web_spec_extension_adapters_next_request__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_7__.signalFromNodeResponse)(res));\n    try {\n        const invokeRouteModule = async (span)=>{\n            return routeModule.handle(nextReq, context).finally(()=>{\n                if (!span) return;\n                span.setAttributes({\n                    'http.status_code': res.statusCode,\n                    'next.rsc': false\n                });\n                const rootSpanAttributes = tracer.getRootSpanAttributes();\n                // We were unable to get attributes, probably OTEL is not enabled\n                if (!rootSpanAttributes) {\n                    return;\n                }\n                if (rootSpanAttributes.get('next.span_type') !== next_dist_server_lib_trace_constants__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_8__.BaseServerSpan.handleRequest) {\n                    console.warn(`Unexpected root span type '${rootSpanAttributes.get('next.span_type')}'. Please report this Next.js issue https://github.com/vercel/next.js`);\n                    return;\n                }\n                const route = rootSpanAttributes.get('next.route');\n                if (route) {\n                    const name = `${method} ${route}`;\n                    span.setAttributes({\n                        'next.route': route,\n                        'http.route': route,\n                        'next.span_name': name\n                    });\n                    span.updateName(name);\n                } else {\n                    span.updateName(`${method} ${req.url}`);\n                }\n            });\n        };\n        const handleResponse = async (currentSpan)=>{\n            var _cacheEntry_value;\n            const responseGenerator = async ({ previousCacheEntry })=>{\n                try {\n                    if (!(0,next_dist_server_request_meta__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__.getRequestMeta)(req, 'minimalMode') && isOnDemandRevalidate && revalidateOnlyGenerated && !previousCacheEntry) {\n                        res.statusCode = 404;\n                        // on-demand revalidate always sets this header\n                        res.setHeader('x-nextjs-cache', 'REVALIDATED');\n                        res.end('This page could not be found');\n                        return null;\n                    }\n                    const response = await invokeRouteModule(currentSpan);\n                    req.fetchMetrics = context.renderOpts.fetchMetrics;\n                    let pendingWaitUntil = context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil;\n                    // Attempt using provided waitUntil if available\n                    // if it's not we fallback to sendResponse's handling\n                    if (pendingWaitUntil) {\n                        if (ctx.waitUntil) {\n                            ctx.waitUntil(pendingWaitUntil);\n                            pendingWaitUntil = undefined;\n                        }\n                    }\n                    const cacheTags = context.renderOpts.collectedTags;\n                    // If the request is for a static response, we can cache it so long\n                    // as it's not edge.\n                    if (isIsr) {\n                        const blob = await response.blob();\n                        // Copy the headers from the response.\n                        const headers = (0,next_dist_server_web_utils__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_11__.toNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders)(response.headers);\n                        if (cacheTags) {\n                            headers[next_dist_lib_constants__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__.NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER] = cacheTags;\n                        }\n                        if (!headers['content-type'] && blob.type) {\n                            headers['content-type'] = blob.type;\n                        }\n                        const revalidate = typeof context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate === 'undefined' || context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate >= next_dist_lib_constants__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__.INFINITE_CACHE ? false : context.renderOpts.collectedRevalidate;\n                        const expire = typeof context.renderOpts.collectedExpire === 'undefined' || context.renderOpts.collectedExpire >= next_dist_lib_constants__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__.INFINITE_CACHE ? undefined : context.renderOpts.collectedExpire;\n                        // Create the cache entry for the response.\n                        const cacheEntry = {\n                            value: {\n                                kind: next_dist_server_response_cache__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_15__.CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n                                status: response.status,\n                                body: Buffer.from(await blob.arrayBuffer()),\n                                headers\n                            },\n                            cacheControl: {\n                                revalidate,\n                                expire\n                            }\n                        };\n                        return cacheEntry;\n                    } else {\n                        // send response without caching if not ISR\n                        await (0,next_dist_server_send_response__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_10__.sendResponse)(nodeNextReq, nodeNextRes, response, context.renderOpts.pendingWaitUntil);\n                        return null;\n                    }\n                } catch (err) {\n                    // if this is a background revalidate we need to report\n                    // the request error here as it won't be bubbled\n                    if (previousCacheEntry == null ? void 0 : previousCacheEntry.isStale) {\n                        await routeModule.onRequestError(req, err, {\n                            routerKind: 'App Router',\n                            routePath: srcPage,\n                            routeType: 'route',\n                            revalidateReason: (0,next_dist_server_instrumentation_utils__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_9__.getRevalidateReason)({\n                                isRevalidate,\n                                isOnDemandRevalidate\n                            })\n                        }, routerServerContext);\n                    }\n                    throw err;\n                }\n            };\n            const cacheEntry = await routeModule.handleResponse({\n                req,\n                nextConfig,\n                cacheKey,\n                routeKind: next_dist_server_route_kind__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.RouteKind.APP_ROUTE,\n                isFallback: false,\n                prerenderManifest,\n                isRoutePPREnabled: false,\n                isOnDemandRevalidate,\n                revalidateOnlyGenerated,\n                responseGenerator,\n                waitUntil: ctx.waitUntil\n            });\n            // we don't create a cacheEntry for ISR\n            if (!isIsr) {\n                return null;\n            }\n            if ((cacheEntry == null ? void 0 : (_cacheEntry_value = cacheEntry.value) == null ? void 0 : _cacheEntry_value.kind) !== next_dist_server_response_cache__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_15__.CachedRouteKind.APP_ROUTE) {\n                var _cacheEntry_value1;\n                throw Object.defineProperty(new Error(`Invariant: app-route received invalid cache entry ${cacheEntry == null ? void 0 : (_cacheEntry_value1 = cacheEntry.value) == null ? void 0 : _cacheEntry_value1.kind}`), \"__NEXT_ERROR_CODE\", {\n                    value: \"E701\",\n                    enumerable: false,\n                    configurable: true\n                });\n            }\n            if (!(0,next_dist_server_request_meta__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__.getRequestMeta)(req, 'minimalMode')) {\n                res.setHeader('x-nextjs-cache', isOnDemandRevalidate ? 'REVALIDATED' : cacheEntry.isMiss ? 'MISS' : cacheEntry.isStale ? 'STALE' : 'HIT');\n            }\n            // Draft mode should never be cached\n            if (isDraftMode) {\n                res.setHeader('Cache-Control', 'private, no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate');\n            }\n            const headers = (0,next_dist_server_web_utils__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_11__.fromNodeOutgoingHttpHeaders)(cacheEntry.value.headers);\n            if (!((0,next_dist_server_request_meta__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__.getRequestMeta)(req, 'minimalMode') && isIsr)) {\n                headers.delete(next_dist_lib_constants__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_13__.NEXT_CACHE_TAGS_HEADER);\n            }\n            // If cache control is already set on the response we don't\n            // override it to allow users to customize it via next.config\n            if (cacheEntry.cacheControl && !res.getHeader('Cache-Control') && !headers.get('Cache-Control')) {\n                headers.set('Cache-Control', (0,next_dist_server_lib_cache_control__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_12__.getCacheControlHeader)(cacheEntry.cacheControl));\n            }\n            await (0,next_dist_server_send_response__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_10__.sendResponse)(nodeNextReq, nodeNextRes, new Response(cacheEntry.value.body, {\n                headers,\n                status: cacheEntry.value.status || 200\n            }));\n            return null;\n        };\n        // TODO: activeSpan code path is for when wrapped by\n        // next-server can be removed when this is no longer used\n        if (activeSpan) {\n            await handleResponse(activeSpan);\n        } else {\n            await tracer.withPropagatedContext(req.headers, ()=>tracer.trace(next_dist_server_lib_trace_constants__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_8__.BaseServerSpan.handleRequest, {\n                    spanName: `${method} ${req.url}`,\n                    kind: next_dist_server_lib_trace_tracer__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__.SpanKind.SERVER,\n                    attributes: {\n                        'http.method': method,\n                        'http.target': req.url\n                    }\n                }, handleResponse));\n        }\n    } catch (err) {\n        if (!(err instanceof next_dist_shared_lib_no_fallback_error_external__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_14__.NoFallbackError)) {\n            await routeModule.onRequestError(req, err, {\n                routerKind: 'App Router',\n                routePath: normalizedSrcPage,\n                routeType: 'route',\n                revalidateReason: (0,next_dist_server_instrumentation_utils__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_9__.getRevalidateReason)({\n                    isRevalidate,\n                    isOnDemandRevalidate\n                })\n            });\n        }\n        // rethrow so that we can handle serving error page\n        // If this is during static generation, throw the error again.\n        if (isIsr) throw err;\n        // Otherwise, send a 500 response.\n        await (0,next_dist_server_send_response__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_10__.sendResponse)(nodeNextReq, nodeNextRes, new Response(null, {\n            status: 500\n        }));\n        return null;\n    }\n}\n\n//# sourceMappingURL=app-route.js.map\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(rsc)/./node_modules/next/dist/build/webpack/loaders/next-app-loader/index.js?name=app%2Fapi%2Fsolve%2Froute&page=%2Fapi%2Fsolve%2Froute&appPaths=&pagePath=private-next-app-dir%2Fapi%2Fsolve%2Froute.ts&appDir=%2Fhome%2Fjayadev-narayanan%2FDesktop%2Ffukoff%2Fmakeaton%2Fapp&pageExtensions=tsx&pageExtensions=ts&pageExtensions=jsx&pageExtensions=js&rootDir=%2Fhome%2Fjayadev-narayanan%2FDesktop%2Ffukoff%2Fmakeaton&isDev=true&tsconfigPath=tsconfig.json&basePath=&assetPrefix=&nextConfigOutput=&preferredRegion=&middlewareConfig=e30%3D&isGlobalNotFoundEnabled=!\n");

/******/ 	"use strict";
/******/ 	var __webpack_modules__ = ({});
/************************************************************************/
/******/ 	// The module cache
/******/ 	var __webpack_module_cache__ = {};
/******/ 	
/******/ 	// The require function
/******/ 	function __webpack_require__(moduleId) {
/******/ 		// Check if module is in cache
/******/ 		var cachedModule = __webpack_module_cache__[moduleId];
/******/ 		if (cachedModule !== undefined) {
/******/ 			return cachedModule.exports;
/******/ 		}
/******/ 		// Create a new module (and put it into the cache)
/******/ 		var module = __webpack_module_cache__[moduleId] = {
/******/ 			id: moduleId,
/******/ 			loaded: false,
/******/ 			exports: {}
/******/ 		};
/******/ 	
/******/ 		// Execute the module function
/******/ 		var threw = true;
/******/ 		try {
/******/ 			__webpack_modules__[moduleId](module, module.exports, __webpack_require__);
/******/ 			threw = false;
/******/ 		} finally {
/******/ 			if(threw) delete __webpack_module_cache__[moduleId];
/******/ 		}
/******/ 	
/******/ 		// Flag the module as loaded
/******/ 		module.loaded = true;
/******/ 	
/******/ 		// Return the exports of the module
/******/ 		return module.exports;
/******/ 	}
/******/ 	
/******/ 	// expose the modules object (__webpack_modules__)
/******/ 	__webpack_require__.m = __webpack_modules__;
/******/ 	
/************************************************************************/
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/amd options */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.amdO = {};
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/compat get default export */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		// getDefaultExport function for compatibility with non-harmony modules
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.n = (module) => {
/******/ 			var getter = module && module.__esModule ?
/******/ 				() => (module['default']) :
/******/ 				() => (module);
/******/ 			__webpack_require__.d(getter, { a: getter });
/******/ 			return getter;
/******/ 		};
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/create fake namespace object */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		var getProto = Object.getPrototypeOf ? (obj) => (Object.getPrototypeOf(obj)) : (obj) => (obj.__proto__);
/******/ 		var leafPrototypes;
/******/ 		// create a fake namespace object
/******/ 		// mode & 1: value is a module id, require it
/******/ 		// mode & 2: merge all properties of value into the ns
/******/ 		// mode & 4: return value when already ns object
/******/ 		// mode & 16: return value when it's Promise-like
/******/ 		// mode & 8|1: behave like require
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.t = function(value, mode) {
/******/ 			if(mode & 1) value = this(value);
/******/ 			if(mode & 8) return value;
/******/ 			if(typeof value === 'object' && value) {
/******/ 				if((mode & 4) && value.__esModule) return value;
/******/ 				if((mode & 16) && typeof value.then === 'function') return value;
/******/ 			}
/******/ 			var ns = Object.create(null);
/******/ 			__webpack_require__.r(ns);
/******/ 			var def = {};
/******/ 			leafPrototypes = leafPrototypes || [null, getProto({}), getProto([]), getProto(getProto)];
/******/ 			for(var current = mode & 2 && value; typeof current == 'object' && !~leafPrototypes.indexOf(current); current = getProto(current)) {
/******/ 				Object.getOwnPropertyNames(current).forEach((key) => (def[key] = () => (value[key])));
/******/ 			}
/******/ 			def['default'] = () => (value);
/******/ 			__webpack_require__.d(ns, def);
/******/ 			return ns;
/******/ 		};
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/define property getters */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		// define getter functions for harmony exports
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.d = (exports, definition) => {
/******/ 			for(var key in definition) {
/******/ 				if(__webpack_require__.o(definition, key) && !__webpack_require__.o(exports, key)) {
/******/ 					Object.defineProperty(exports, key, { enumerable: true, get: definition[key] });
/******/ 				}
/******/ 			}
/******/ 		};
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/ensure chunk */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.f = {};
/******/ 		// This file contains only the entry chunk.
/******/ 		// The chunk loading function for additional chunks
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.e = (chunkId) => {
/******/ 			return Promise.all(Object.keys(__webpack_require__.f).reduce((promises, key) => {
/******/ 				__webpack_require__.f[key](chunkId, promises);
/******/ 				return promises;
/******/ 			}, []));
/******/ 		};
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/get javascript chunk filename */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		// This function allow to reference async chunks and sibling chunks for the entrypoint
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.u = (chunkId) => {
/******/ 			// return url for filenames based on template
/******/ 			return "" + chunkId + ".js";
/******/ 		};
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/getFullHash */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.h = () => ("679b458d0a50054d")
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/hasOwnProperty shorthand */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.o = (obj, prop) => (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, prop))
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/make namespace object */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		// define __esModule on exports
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.r = (exports) => {
/******/ 			if(typeof Symbol !== 'undefined' && Symbol.toStringTag) {
/******/ 				Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: 'Module' });
/******/ 			}
/******/ 			Object.defineProperty(exports, '__esModule', { value: true });
/******/ 		};
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/node module decorator */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.nmd = (module) => {
/******/ 			module.paths = [];
/******/ 			if (!module.children) module.children = [];
/******/ 			return module;
/******/ 		};
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/startup entrypoint */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.X = (result, chunkIds, fn) => {
/******/ 			// arguments: chunkIds, moduleId are deprecated
/******/ 			var moduleId = chunkIds;
/******/ 			if(!fn) chunkIds = result, fn = () => (__webpack_require__(__webpack_require__.s = moduleId));
/******/ 			chunkIds.map(__webpack_require__.e, __webpack_require__)
/******/ 			var r = fn();
/******/ 			return r === undefined ? result : r;
/******/ 		}
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/******/ 	/* webpack/runtime/require chunk loading */
/******/ 	(() => {
/******/ 		// no baseURI
/******/ 		
/******/ 		// object to store loaded chunks
/******/ 		// "1" means "loaded", otherwise not loaded yet
/******/ 		var installedChunks = {
/******/ 			"webpack-runtime": 1
/******/ 		};
/******/ 		
/******/ 		// no on chunks loaded
/******/ 		
/******/ 		var installChunk = (chunk) => {
/******/ 			var moreModules = chunk.modules, chunkIds = chunk.ids, runtime = chunk.runtime;
/******/ 			for(var moduleId in moreModules) {
/******/ 				if(__webpack_require__.o(moreModules, moduleId)) {
/******/ 					__webpack_require__.m[moduleId] = moreModules[moduleId];
/******/ 				}
/******/ 			}
/******/ 			if(runtime) runtime(__webpack_require__);
/******/ 			for(var i = 0; i < chunkIds.length; i++)
/******/ 				installedChunks[chunkIds[i]] = 1;
/******/ 		
/******/ 		};
/******/ 		
/******/ 		// require() chunk loading for javascript
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.f.require = (chunkId, promises) => {
/******/ 			// "1" is the signal for "already loaded"
/******/ 			if(!installedChunks[chunkId]) {
/******/ 				if("webpack-runtime" != chunkId) {
/******/ 					installChunk(require("./" + __webpack_require__.u(chunkId)));
/******/ 				} else installedChunks[chunkId] = 1;
/******/ 			}
/******/ 		};
/******/ 		
/******/ 		module.exports = __webpack_require__;
/******/ 		__webpack_require__.C = installChunk;
/******/ 		
/******/ 		// no HMR
/******/ 		
/******/ 		// no HMR manifest
/******/ 	})();
/******/ 	
/************************************************************************/
/******/ 	
/******/ 	
/******/ })()

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,
;\n\n### FILE: ./.next/server/middleware-build-manifest.js ###\n

  },
  "ampFirstPages": []
};
globalThis.__BUILD_MANIFEST.lowPriorityFiles = [

,"/static/" + process.env.__NEXT_BUILD_ID + "/_ssgManifest.js",

}\n\n### FILE: ./tsconfig.json ###\n
